hotel_name: Khách sạn Thăng Bình - FLC Sầm Sơn (Thang Binh Hotel - FLC Sam Son)

reviews.title: Many issues, not worth the money.
reviews.text:
- no room with a sea view, even though I rented a room with a sea view
- no room cleaning, towel replacement despite reminding 3 times
- the room lacks many amenities compared to what was advertised (I requested a hair dryer several times but it was not provided)
- food was insufficient despite being ordered in advance
- each room only had 2 tiny towels, and no other towels
- a room with 2 large beds for 4 adults only had 2 bottles of water
- the bathroom drainage was poor, causing flooding
- no cold water coming out when showering, only hot water (my child almost got scalded), had to open the cold water tap and wait 30 minutes for cold water to come out. This issue was mentioned on the first day, but it remained the same on the second day
- when booking the room, they said breakfast was included, but one day there was none, and when requested, the service was very slow as if asking for a favor
- when I complained to the staff, I only received replies that they were just employees, not caring or addressing the issues
- renting a room from Saturday to Tuesday is relatively expensive ***/room/night, but the quality received is only like a ***,*** guesthouse.

reviews.title: Thật tồi tệ. Nếu dịch vun như vậy thì không nên bán phòng trên booking
reviews.negatives: Tôi và gia đình đã đến Thăng Bình hotel lúc 22h15' ngày 27/4/2024. Tuy nhiên KH báo không có phòng và yêu cầu tôi phải liên lạc với KS trước khi đến để chuyển tiền đặt cọc phòng . Tôi đã trao đổi là trên booking không yêu cầu phải thanh toán trước . Sau đó nhân viên yêu cầu tôi liên lạc với nhân viên booking để thắc mắc viẹc đặt phòng rồi mà không có phòng . Thật tồi tệ

reviews.title: Noise
reviews.text: Dirty swimming pool, poor soundproofing, unclear staff consultation, monotonous breakfast food.

reviews.title: Quá tệ
reviews.positives: Trả tiền bữa sáng mà không có bữa sáng ăn vì cho khách đi nhà vớ vẩn
reviews.negatives: Đặt phòng 1 kiểu chỗ ở 1 kiểu quá tệ

reviews.title: Extremely bad
reviews.text: Arriving by scooter, nobody was able to tell me where the reception was; I wandered around the resort for 15 minutes without anyone giving me directions. When I reached the reception, they couldn't find my reservation, indicating a computer issue, and they could only offer me a room for five times the price of my booking while the hotel was empty. Since it was their fault, I asked them to make some gesture. They offered me a slightly more expensive room in a nearby hotel. I accepted. The hotel recommended by the reception was simply dirty, noisy, and uncomfortable. The staff were friendly despite everything, but it is UNACCEPTABLE for a 4-star establishment.

reviews.title: Not the room as described.
reviews.text: Lack of responsibility, transferring customers elsewhere, very dissatisfied.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Không hài lòng với chi phi  phòng cao mà thực tế ko như mong đợi
reviews.negatives: Giá cao so với điều kiện khách sạn

reviews.title: Dirty room
reviews.text: I checked in early at 12 PM and they didn't have time to clean my room, so I asked them to clean it and I returned at 7 PM but it still hadn't been cleaned.

reviews.title: Thất vọng về Thanh Hoá, giá phòng quá cao không xứng đáng với chất lượng
reviews.positives: Rất tệ, chưa bao giờ ăn 1 bữa buffet nào tệ đến vậy
reviews.negatives: Với giá tiền phòng là 1tr600 1 đêm thì thật sự không xứng đáng. Bữa ăn trưa không ngon, đắt mà hải sản không tươi, nấu quá mặn kể cả rau luộc cũng rất mặn, bữa ăn sáng buffet rất tệ, địa điểm di chuyển ra bãi biển quá xa, phòng không có view gì cả( view cầu thang) 🙁🙁🙁🙁

reviews.title: First time in Sầm Sơn, Thanh Hóa with a disappointing experience about the hotel room.
reviews.text: The room price is too high and not worth the quality of service, the food is not delicious and expensive, and the breakfast buffet is not appealing at all. The hotel is also far from the beach.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Bữa sáng không ổn lắm, 8h khách xuống thì hết sạch đồ ăn, bảo chờ để mang ra, chờ mãi thì báo khách sạn hết đồ, chỉ còn mì tôm trứng

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.text: The hotel does not have a pool, does not have breakfast.

reviews.title: Bình thường
reviews.positives: Bữa sáng chọn 1 trong 3 gồm: phở bò, phở gà, cháo ngao
reviews.negatives: phòng không có tủ lạnh, cách âm kém, nhân viên dọn dẹp muộn, máy sấy hỏng, không có nước nóng để tắm

reviews.title: I will never go back to this hotel again.
reviews.text:
There are 4 things that really annoyed me when I got here.  
1: When booking the room, I requested a room with a balcony because we have kids who want to open the window for fresh air, but the hotel assigned us a room in the middle, with the window opening onto a noisy hallway where people pass by. I went down to talk to the receptionist, and they said they didn’t know and to contact Agoda; if not, we would lose money, and there was nothing they could do. The room had unsteady Wi-Fi because it was squeezed between 5 other rooms. 😓😓😓  
2: I came for relaxation, not torture, yet the neighboring room played loud music with the door aimed directly at my room while singing. When I complained to the staff, they didn’t even apologize or offer to remind the guest.  
3: The night staff had a bad attitude toward customers. Our group had three rooms, and one person had the key, but we forgot to give them the card. I asked the staff for help, and they were drinking alcohol at the hotel across the street, had a bad attitude, and muttered things under their breath.  
4: My child had a fever, and my friend went down to ask the staff for fever-reducing medicine (at midnight), but not only did they not help, they also cursed and called my friend annoying. We are tourists who don't know where to buy it; if we did, we wouldn't need to ask. When my child needed to go to the emergency room and asked to call a taxi, they said they didn’t know the number??? They’ve been working here for three years and still don’t know the taxi number???  
In conclusion, the service was extremely bad.
reviews.response: Rất lấy làm tiếc vì sai sót đã khiến quý khách có trải nghiệm không tốt tại Thăng Bình Hotel. Chúng tôi sẽ khắc phục và lưu ý hỗ trợ quý khách hàng tốt nhất ạ. Trân trọng cảm ơn!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Đồ cá nhân sử dụng trong phòng tắm bị ẩm mốc ngấm nước và xà bông

reviews.title: Bored with the service of the hotel.
reviews.text: I'm really tired of the service at the hotel. They gave the wrong room to the guest, and when I mentioned it, they said if I didn't stay, I would lose money, and the hotel wouldn't take responsibility. The wifi doesn't work, and when I plugged it into the room, I lost all phone signal. My nephew had a fever at midnight and needed assistance, but the staff was drunk and didn't help, even using profanity. In the middle of the night, when we needed to go to the emergency room, the staff couldn't even help with calling a taxi. In the morning, when we talked to them again, they still seemed confused about everything. The service is truly terrible...

reviews.title: Một kỳ nghỉ bên gia đình tuyệt vờ
reviews.positives: Bữa sáng ăn theo kiểu tô phở, tô cháo nên chưa phong phú mấy. Muốn đi dạo bãi biển hay vào hội trường thì phải đi xe điện, không đi bộ được.
reviews.negatives: Phải bắt buộc ăn 1 bữa tại khách sạn, mà cái điều này ở du lịch miền Nam chưa thấy có tiền lệ này. Mình khá là bất ngờ khi mà hàng loạt các khách sạn tại Sầm Sơn đều ràng buộc khách hàng về điểm này.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Not commensurate with the costs incurred. 
The room lacks essential items such as tea and coffee. 
The setup of the bathroom and toilet is not satisfactory, lacking toilet paper and towels, and when supplies are needed, they are not promptly provided. 
The breakfast offered is only a simple pho (beef, chicken), with no buffet available.

reviews.title: Newly built hotel.
reviews.text: The newly built hotel is clean. The location of the accommodation is a bit far from the main beach.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Khách sạn tốt, dịch vụ oke, tuy nhiên cần có lễ tân ngồi chứ lúc mình cần thì chẳng thấy lễ tân đâu
reviews.negatives: Nên trang bị thêm nước rửa tay, máy sấy nên kiểm tra lại vì phòng mình máy sấy hư không dùng được

reviews.title: Causing difficulties for customers.
reviews.text: I had booked a double room, but when I arrived to check in, I waited for a long time, and the staff informed me there was a mistake, so I only got a single room. Then the staff contacted another place, which was a bit far and deep, and I had to pay extra.

reviews.title: Vui
reviews.negatives: Ko có ghế ở bàn trang điểm

reviews.title: Need to improve the cleanliness. The bed cover is not clean, has some dark spots and sand on it. The bathroom is not clean.  The room corners are dirty. The double room but is not spacious at all
reviews.text: Nice staff but the room facility is new.     Room is not clean much.

reviews.title: Grand
reviews.text: Was ok

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Perhaps the kindness of the receptionist.
reviews.negatives: the AC wasn't working well, phone was inaccessible, the food  and they made me believe that it was beachfront hotel but have to walk few kilometres away.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: I booked a room in Thang Binh, but when I arrived, the staff transferred me to another hotel. I think it was because they were fully booked. It's quite disappointing for a hotel to do that; it feels a bit unprofessional.

reviews.title: Avoid Sam Son if you're a foreign tourist.
reviews.positives: They allowed pets....but only after I showed the owner their online Booking.com policies that clearly stated PETS ALLOWED. They initially tried to refuse me accommodation saying they didn't accept pets.
reviews.negatives:
The beds are rock hard and way too uncomfortable. 
The onsite private parking is a complete lie. I was told I had to park down the road (which I refused to do...I locked my bike and left it where it was!!!!)
The whole area of Sam Son is suited to Vietnamese nationals to come on holiday. As they have no regard for being inappropriately loud, whether early or late, and completely disregard that others maybe still asleep, you WON'T get any peace and quiet...maybe between 2am-4am!!!! They all think that if they're awake it's OK.

reviews.title: Feelings after the experience.
reviews.text: Honestly, after arriving, I found it to be very different from what I saw on the app. The app indicated that breakfast was included, but when I arrived, the hotel informed me that it was not. They claimed there was an electric shuttle to the beach, but the staff said since I booked through Agoda, I wouldn't receive support. The app stated it was 500m from the beach, but in reality, it was over 1km away. The room view I booked was supposed to be ocean-facing, but in reality, there was none, as it was more than 1km from the beach, so I could only see buildings. I couldn’t see the ocean at all. Overall, I definitely will not return for a second time.

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the FLC area, so it's convenient for travel. However, the quality is quite poor... When I arrived at the hotel, no one came to greet or help with the luggage, or guide guests to the parking area. The room was lacking bath towels, and after calling twice, no one brought them up. The room was clean.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The single room is temporarily acceptable, the double room is too cramped for 4 people. The staff service is good.

reviews.title: Suitable for the price
reviews.text: The room is reasonably priced, clean but not very soundproof, and has ants.

reviews.title: Sam Son
reviews.text: Quite far from the beach, Must take a tram which is quite expensive, Not close to dining spots.

reviews.title: Room transfer procedure
reviews.text: I booked a room on Agoda, but switched to another hotel and the two parties couldn't come to an agreement on the price, which delayed my room check-in.

reviews.title: Perfectly matches the price!
reviews.text: Quickly booked a hotel in the FLC area, going on a trip right on the 2nd of September holiday. The hotel is located in the FLC area. Clean. There is plenty of parking space. Walk to Tuan 5 is about 600m. The price is very reasonable as it also includes breakfast.

reviews.title: Valuable hotel
reviews.text: Reasonable prices, the service was also very good. I went at the end of the tourist season, so there weren't many guests, which made breakfast (included with the room) a bit sparse, but the staff was polite, and the rooms were tidy and well-equipped.

reviews.title: Room
reviews.text: Clean and spacious rooms.

reviews.title: Holiday 2/5/2025÷3/5/2025
reviews.text: Everything is fine. Ok cool.

reviews.title: Good hotel near FLC beach
reviews.text: If you're looking for accommodation in the FLC area, Thang Binh Hotel is a good choice. The hotel looks new and clean, it's a 3-star standard, with room rates of 800k which is reasonable for a Saturday night during the peak season and includes breakfast. The reception staff is extremely friendly and provides great assistance to guests. I had a very convenient check-in and check-out experience. The room is tidy, clean, and the mattress is comfortable. However, the cleaning staff needs to pay attention to removing calcium deposits from the shower glass. If you have children, you should choose a room on the second floor because it's close to the swimming pool, which is very convenient for moving around. However, the second floor may not be suitable for those who prefer peace and quiet. The floor on the second level is always damp due to being near the pool. You also cannot walk from the hotel to FLC beach, but you can use the hotel's free bicycles or the electric shuttle provided by the hotel that can take you around the FLC area for free during the hours of 8-11 AM or 4-6 PM. Outside of these hours or when traveling outside the FLC area, you will have to pay a fee. The usual price for a trip within the FLC area is 50k, and you should ask for the price before getting on the vehicle. Nevertheless, the free transportation is what I appreciated the most during my stay here.

reviews.title: Clean place, good staff, delicious food.
reviews.text: The hotel in the FLC area has an electric shuttle to the FLC beach, food can be ordered at the hotel, it's delicious, and the furnishings are new.

reviews.title: The staff is enthusiastic and friendly.
reviews.text: The room near the swimming pool has a rather unpleasant smell, like a sewer or filter tank. However, the staff is very enthusiastic; my family arrived earlier than expected and they kindly offered us a room to rest for an hour at no charge. We weren't pressured to order food at the hotel like at other places. The staff is happy to assist with anything needed, overall it's worth the money.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel has a whole floor with an outdoor pool, which is very convenient and clean.

reviews.title: 운용을 안하는데 숙박을 받네요
reviews.text:
예약하고 호텔에 가보니 문은 자물쇠로 닫혀있고 어떤 남자가 옆 호텔 방을 보여주면서 여기서 있으라고 하여 아고다로 예약 했으니 돈을 내지 않아도 되냐고 물어 봤더니 500000d 내라고 해서 난 간다고 하고
아고다에 문의하니 숙소 관계자와 얘기 후 다시가서 숙박하면 된다고 하여 가보니 그 어떤 남자가 다시 방을 안내  하더군요
어리숙했다면 아마 난 그 어떤 남자한테 사기를 당할뻔 했네요 이런일이 다른분들 한테도 일어나지 안았으면 합니다.
